normalized_title: Position Statement: Dark Sky and Astrotourism
scope_summary: WAPC position on preserving dark sky locations and facilitating astrotourism throughout Western Australia. It applies to region/sub-regional and local planning strategies, schemes, structure plans, subdivision and development proposals (it does not apply retrospectively or to exempt development), and sets five dark sky lighting principles plus dust management expectations. Appendices provide model special control area provisions (notably for areas within 20 km of an observatory) and a model local planning policy with lighting and dust management development standards.

key_numeric_standards.topic: special control area extent for dark sky protection

key_numeric_standards.applies_to: all outdoor lighting (warm white / filtered LEDs)
all lighting under the model local planning policy (position statement body suggests 11pm to sunrise)
